title: Aporum ovatipetalum
taxonomy: Aporum ovatipetalum is classified under the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This family encompasses over 30,000 species of orchids, making it one of the largest and most diverse plant families. Within the Orchidaceae family, Aporum ovatipetalum is further classified into the subfamily Epidendroideae. The subfamily Epidendroideae includes many genera of orchids, and Aporum ovatipetalum is a member of the tribe Coelogyneae. The tribe Coelogyneae is a group of orchids characterized by their sympodial growth habit and often showy flowers.
